metadata.purpose: Primitive atomic propositions for SHRDLU verification
design_rule: Only keep simple boolean state facts.
Use names that follow simulator state fields closely.
Prefer grounded object relations over generic schema-like predicates.
Do not include combined or derived properties.

current_state_aps.name: some_object_resting_on_4
